allow: Bash(git -c user.name="Lucas" -c user.email="lucas@solariummantiqueira.com" commit -m "Initial scaffold: Next.js 14 landing with Solarium brand")

Bash(node -e "let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(s\); console.log\('count:',r.count, 'limit:', r.limit\); \(r.result||[]\).forEach\(l => console.log\(l.id, '|', l.name, '|', 'guests:', l.personCapacity, '|', 'bedrooms:', l.bedroomsNumber\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(s\).result; console.log\('keys:',Object.keys\(r\).join\(','\)\); console.log\('price:',r.price,'currency:',r.currencyCode,'cleaning:',r.cleaningFee\); console.log\('minNights:',r.minNights,'maxNights:',r.maxNights\); console.log\('amenities count:', \(r.listingAmenities||[]\).length\); console.log\('first amenity:', r.listingAmenities && r.listingAmenities[0]\); console.log\('images count:', \(r.listingImages||[]\).length\); console.log\('first image keys:', r.listingImages && r.listingImages[0] && Object.keys\(r.listingImages[0]\).join\(','\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(s\).result; console.log\('amenities:', \(r.listingAmenities||[]\).length, 'images:', \(r.listingImages||[]\).length\); if\(r.listingAmenities && r.listingAmenities[0]\) console.log\('amen sample:', JSON.stringify\(r.listingAmenities[0]\)\); if\(r.listingImages && r.listingImages[0]\) console.log\('img sample:', JSON.stringify\(r.listingImages[0]\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "const lr=require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\('hasInstagram:', !!lr.Instagram, 'version:', require\('lucide-react/package.json'\).version\); console.log\('keys with insta:', Object.keys\(lr\).filter\(k=>k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('insta'\)\).slice\(0,10\)\);")
PowerShell($myPid = $PID; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.ProcessId -ne $myPid } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List)
Bash(git -c user.name="Lucas" -c user.email="lucas@solariummantiqueira.com" commit -m "Sprint 1: full landing with Hostaway integration, booking flow, content pages")
Bash(git -c user.name="Lucas" -c user.email="lucas@solariummantiqueira.com" commit -m "Sprint 2.5: Hostaway 403-retry+debug, end-to-end booking draft, 17 UX/copy/visual fixes")

Bash(node -e "let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(s\); console.log\('approach:',r.approach\); console.log\('result:', JSON.stringify\(r.result,null,2\).slice\(0,500\)\); console.log\('rawDays:', r.rawDays.length,'days'\);}\)")
